title: Balboa Corp launches in Panama to bring stablecoins to shipping and trade finance
snippet: BALBOA | CORP , Panama’s first local stablecoin issuer and infrastructure company focused on shipping, trade settlement and escrow, today announced its launch from stealth, unveiling infrastructure designed to reduce payment friction in shipping, trade-finance and international commerce.

title: UBS partners with five banks for Swiss franc stablecoin sandbox
snippet: UBS, PostFinance, Sygnum and others launched a 2026 sandbox to test Swiss franc stablecoin use cases and blockchain payment rails in Switzerland.

title: FDIC moves to regulate stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act
snippet: FDIC’s proposed rules providing insurance for corporate deposits of stablecoin issuers will not extend to the stablecoin holders, as it would conflict with the GENIUS Act’s text, the FDIC said.

title: FDIC Reveals Proposed Rules for Stablecoin Issuers Under GENIUS Act
snippet: The FDIC’s proposal establishes federal oversight standards for stablecoin issuers while explicitly excluding tokens from deposit insurance protections.

title: FDIC proposes ruleset for stablecoin issuers following GENIUS enactment
snippet: The FDIC proposed a rule to establish a regulatory framework for stablecoin issuers and is seeking public input.

title: Stablecoin issuers get closer to U.S. federal rules with FDIC's new proposal

title: UBS, Sygnum, PostFinance join banks in Swiss franc stablecoin sandbox
snippet: Seven financial institutions launched sandbox testing regulated Swiss franc stablecoin, running through 2026 as stablecoin usage accelerates globally.

title: Stablecoins gain traction in B2B payments
snippet: Stablecoins have reached a market cap of $312 billion — a 60-fold increase since 2020 — and now facilitate $33 trillion in annual transaction volume, according to a report from Morph.

title: Stablecoin startup Inxy raises $4 million
snippet: INXY has raised $4 million in a new funding round led by Flashpoint, following a $3 million raise in 2025, bringing its total seed funding to $7 million.

title: CME Group expands crypto futures with Avalanche and Sui contracts
snippet: CME Group said it will launch Avalanche and Sui futures contracts pending regulatory approval, as it expands its regulated crypto product offering.

title: Stablecoin settlement: Why PSPs can’t afford to delay
snippet: How PSPs can push their stablecoin projects from pilot to launch.

title: Split Capital winds down as founder joins stablecoin startup Plasma
snippet: Split Capital founder Zaheer Ebtikar is closing his crypto hedge fund after strong returns to join Plasma as chief strategy officer, citing a major industry shift.

title: EPAA and Monash Fintech Lab sign MoU
snippet: Emerging Payments Association Asia (EPAA) and Monash University Malaysia have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to bring together payments leaders and academic experts to shape a more resilient, inclusive and forward-looking payments system for Asia Pacific (APAC).
